summary: Validated NEW Stripe admin-settings surface and the pay-at-creation + driver cash-out frontends. 17/17 new backend tests passed: masked GET (no full keys), auth/role guards, validation (live-mode without live key 400; bad sk_test_ 400; wrong-prefix pk_test as live key 400; invalid mode 400), webhook_secret persistence (set->true, GET reflects). Light payment regression after dynamic-key refactor passes: shipper authorize-test -> authorized with ~20% commission, admin capture -> captured, /payments/config reports configured+test_mode, driver wallet shape OK, withdraw below-min/above-balance rejected, valid withdraw OK, admin financials overview KPIs present. Frontend mobile preview (390x844): shipper tracking screen shows payment-card, payment-status-label='Payment required' and authorize-payment-button='Authorize €49.32' as expected. Driver wallet flow: wallet-screen+wallet-balance render (€838.01), cash-out-button opens modal, €5 yields clear 'Minimum cash-out is €10.00' validation banner, €10 yields 'Cash-out of €10.00 requested.' success banner and balance decreases. Webhook secret was RESET to empty at end (verified). One MINOR frontend race: a full-page reload directly into /shipper-tracking can fire the first fetch before AuthProvider hydrates the token from AsyncStorage, briefly showing 'Couldn’t load shipment' until Retry; the in-app create->redirect flow is unaffected.

ui_bugs.issue: On a hard reload of /shipper-tracking, the initial fetch fires before AuthProvider restores authToken from AsyncStorage, producing a 401 and the 'Couldn’t load shipment' error screen until the user taps Retry. In normal create->redirect navigation the token is already in memory so this is invisible, but it is worth guarding by either awaiting auth hydration or auto-retrying once when getAuthToken() is null.

Console warning after driver login: 'The action REPLACE with payload {name:"driver-home"} was not handled by any navigator. Do you have a route named driver-home?' Visible only in dev; the URL still resolves correctly but the warning suggests a stale router.replace target somewhere.

action_items: (Optional) In shipper-tracking.tsx, make loadShipment/loadPayment wait for auth hydration or retry once when getAuthToken() returns null, to avoid the 'Couldn’t load shipment' flash on hard reload.
(Optional) Fix the 'driver-home' navigator warning: ensure router.replace('/driver-home') matches an existing Expo Router route (or change to the actual route name).
critical_code_review_comments: services/payments.validate_key correctly enforces sk_ prefix per environment and performs a real Stripe ping, returning a clean ValueError -> 400 surface. Good.
GET /admin/settings/stripe returns ONLY masked strings via _mask (sk_test_XXX…YYYY); no raw key leak. Persisted in stripe_settings collection by _persist_stripe_settings(). Solid.
/app/backend/server.py is a single very large file (~5860 lines). Consider splitting routers (payments, admin, wallet) into modules. Not blocking.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (payment card visible, cash-out happy + validation paths)

seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed-demo executed; new TEST_-prefixed shipper orders created for authorize/capture and tracking-screen UI test. Two driver cash-out requests of €10 each created (one as part of UI test, one as part of API regression).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe admin-settings endpoint shape: GET returns {configured, mode, currency, test_configured, live_configured, test_key_masked, live_key_masked, active_key_masked, webhook_configured}. Mask format uses an ellipsis (…). POST validations are strict; passing a non-Stripe sk_test_ string triggers a real Stripe ping that returns 400. Always RESET webhook_secret to '' after testing - prior tests already did this. Frontend: AsyncStorage-on-web uses raw localStorage keys nadaruns_auth_token and nadaruns_user. The shipper-tracking screen has a minor auth-hydration race on hard reload; in-app SPA navigation does not trigger it. testIDs verified: payment-card, payment-status-label, authorize-payment-button, wallet-screen, wallet-balance, cash-out-button, withdraw-amount-input, withdraw-confirm-button.
rca_of_issue: n/a - no critical bugs found; the only finding is a minor auth-hydration race on hard reload into shipper-tracking which is cosmetic (Retry recovers immediately).
